purpose: M-CONTRACT legacy seven-condition scorecardに追加して確認するCR-grounding overlay。現行m-contract-gate scriptはこのoverlayをまだ判定しない。

legacyScorecard.reason: 旧7条件は有用な研究測定だが、CR-grounded state-transition golden casesとR-FREEZE設計判断を含まない。

freezeDecision.reason: CR-grounding handoffは揃ったが、docs契約反映・scorecard overlay配線・Fable承認が未完了。

overlayConditions.name: Mana abilities CR 605
overlayConditions.remainingBoundary: Triggered mana abilities CR 605.1b/605.4a are not implemented and must not be reported as PASS.

overlayConditions.name: Commander zone choice CR 903.9a/b
overlayConditions.remainingBoundary: 903.9a bridge is implemented, but generic pendingRuleChoices/deferred SBA choice UI are S-CHOICE carry.

overlayConditions.name: Token death before token cease CR 111.7/704.5d
Triggered abilities, SBA, priority CR 603/704/117
overlayConditions.remainingBoundary: 603.3b second bucket and full SBA suite are not implemented and must not be reported as PASS.

overlayConditions.name: Zone movement and LKI CR 400.7/603.10a
overlayConditions.remainingBoundary: CR 400.7 exceptions and full effective-characteristics snapshots are S-* carry.

overlayConditions.name: 2026-06-19 new vocabulary
overlayConditions.remainingBoundary: Heal/Power-up/Teamwork/Preparation executors are scope-boundary and must not be reported as implemented.

rFreezeDesigns.decisionDirection: Add PendingTrigger.stackPlacementBucket and order as bucket -> APNAP -> controller choice.
Keep triggered mana abilities out of normal pendingTriggers and resolve inside mana transactions.
Classify remaining unimplemented CR areas as S-* carry, scope-boundary, or PASS(core).

nextAction.action: Review overlay, update docs contract, then decide whether to delegate scorecard overlay wiring to Codex.
codexShouldNotDoBeforeReview: Run m-contract-gate and replace superseded scorecard as if CR overlay were included
Proceed to 704.5p or other individual SBA implementation
